creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to rkoberman from comment #107)
Updating kBuild from the latest package build on Main did the trick. I am now able to build virtualbox-ose-kmod again.

I am baffled as to why installing the new kBuld deleted three tools that are totally unrelated to kBuild, They all reinstalled fine after kBuild had been update, but I have no ids why pkg upgrade kBuild felt that they had to be deleted. (All were related to printing including cups-filters and hplip. It also deleted poppler-utils. Not relevant to the ticket, but strange.

Now, on to vitualbox-ose70 and see what happens (after backing up most everything.)

kBuild still needs to build on Main. I still suspect it is ssp related, but won't be surprised if I'm wrong.
